summary:
ITALY VOLCANO AND TSUNAMI VISION: Brandon describes an open vision he received while praying, in which he foresaw a catastrophic volcanic eruption off the coast of Italy. He specifies that the eruption occurs in the water, generating a massive tsunami that causes immense devastation across the region. Brandon notes that the event will be preceded by warning signs, such as earthquakes, tremors, and smoke. The disaster is expected to result in hundreds of thousands of casualties and force the complete shutdown of air traffic in the surrounding area. He repeatedly emphasizes the geographic focus around the gulf area near Pompeii, although he suggests the actual underwater volcano might be situated further out.

SPIRITUAL SIGHTINGS OVER ITALY: Brandon recounts being spiritually elevated to look down upon Italy, where he observed a thick, dark smog blanketing the water and infiltrating houses, which he identifies as a representation of widespread trafficking and corruption in the country. Above this, he witnessed a massive, swirling portal open near the Pompeii area, revealing colorful clouds resembling Heaven. Thousands of angels descended through this portal, moving swiftly to warn people to evacuate their homes. After sensing intercessory prayers over the atmosphere, Brandon watched as the angels abruptly halted their mission and ascended back into the portal.

THE CANARY WARNING AND GROUND GAS: Brandon shares another segment of his vision involving a yellow canary in a cage, drawing a parallel to the concept of a canary in a coal mine. He observed poisonous gas rising out of the ground in Italy. The canary, initially chirping, dropped lifeless to the bottom of the cage due to the mist. Brandon links this ground gas to the earlier warnings of the volcano, massive waves, and water-based earthquakes he foresaw in the gulf area.

AMERICAN ELECTRIC GRID THREATS: Brandon details warnings he received regarding the United States electric grid. He foresees a major cyberattack or a false flag operation that will cause widespread power outages in New York and other major cities. According to Brandon, the grid could remain down for over three weeks. He references a past vision concerning a severe Texas ice storm that caused grid failures and contaminated water with E. coli to emphasize the need for preparation. He advises acquiring solar power and generators capable of running on propane, gasoline, and natural gas. Brandon concludes by detailing his intercessory requests for homeland security, the prevention of cyberattacks, and the protection of the American power infrastructure from foreign adversaries.
rawData: [February 13, 2025]-[Revisiting what the Lord showed me about the volcano in Italy]-[https://youtu.be/aYYsPG5pZng]-[I was praying and the Lord showed me, saying, 'I need you to pray for Italy.' I asked, 'What's going on with Italy, Lord?' He showed me—I had that open vision again—a massive volcano that's about to happen. I saw a coastline on the water where there's a massive volcano. He told me this is going to happen and there will be signs right before a massive explosion. I saw this thing explode huge, and He kept having me pray over the ocean. There's something about the water around Italy. I believe the volcano was right there, because Pompeii is right here and there's a massive volcano up here. When I was looking over in the spirit realm, I thought it was in this area, but I believe it's probably further out. I started looking at where the massive volcanoes in the water are in Italy. If you zoom out, I'll show you; one of the largest is way down here. Whenever I saw this massive volcano going off out of the water, it caused a massive tsunami wave. From the earthquake and this massive volcano, it was like a humongous nuclear bomb went off—it went up out of the water and caused a massive wave. The water rushed all over this area, causing a lot of devastation. The Lord is showing me it came up out of the water and caused all the air traffic around that area to be completely shut down. The Lord showed me it would cost hundreds of thousands of deaths. There will be signs, maybe even on the news in Italy, about rumblings around that area, earthquakes, or tremors to warn that something big is going to happen. Do not ignore this; it is very serious. If you start having a lot of tremors and you start seeing smoke, take heed. Be forewarned; I'm trying to tell you. I was just praying in the spirit, worshiping, and all of a sudden I was shot up. I was looking over Italy, and it looked so small because I was so high up. I was looking down and all of a sudden I could see a black blanket over the water. It was a very thick cloud, as black as molasses, very dark. I could see the black clouds going through all the houses like a smog. I could see the rooftops of the homes and the lights on inside. The Lord pointed my attention to a massive circle, a humongous portal over Italy near where the volcano was by Pompeii. Angels were coming out of this massive portal. It was alive, swirling with clouds, and opening up. All of a sudden, thousands of angels started coming out of this massive portal like soldiers, lined up and descending. Through the portal, clouds were coming out—humongous, beautiful pink, fluffy, blue, and purple. I believe it was Heaven. These angels were descending onto the Earth. When they reached the atmosphere, they started to spread out like ants, moving at the speed of light on a mission. They all had beautiful robes and gowns on. It was amazing. I'm just sitting here in this chair praying in the spirit, soaking it all in. I asked the Lord what that black smog was, and He showed me there is a lot of trafficking and corruption in Italy. Those angels were going to homes and waving their hands, telling people to leave, warning them. You could sense an urgency on their faces. All of a sudden, the angels stopped. I could feel the intercessory prayers from the saints interceding for Italy in the spirit. You could feel the blanket of prayer above the atmosphere. All of a sudden, all the angels froze and turned their bodies to look back up to the massive swirling light of the portal. They started shooting back up into that portal. Then the Lord took me to another part of the vision. He said, 'I want you to focus on the canary.' What is the meaning of a canary in a coal mine? Study this out. I saw a yellow canary in a cage. There was gas like a smog coming up out of the ground. The canary was swinging in its cage in the spirit realm. It was chirping, but then I looked down at the mist coming up out of the ground. When I looked back up, the canary was at the bottom of the cage, lifeless. This gas coming up out of the ground in Italy—I don't know if it was from the volcano, but I saw hundreds of thousands of people go home. A massive wave was coming. The Lord said to pay attention to the water. I saw earthquakes in the water, and He kept pointing me to that in the spirit realm. In my spirit eyes, I could see the water in the gulf area, the gulf right there by Pompeii. For three weeks now, the Lord has spoken to me about the electric grid in America, telling me to pray over the electric grid. This is serious. I saw a cyberattack or a false flag. Power went out in New York and major cities. He warned me that I need to pray about this more intently because of what is being planned. I saw that when the electric grid went down, it had the opportunity to be down for over three weeks. I saw a calendar with the days going by. He showed me a year ago to invest in a generator with three fuel types—propane, gas, and natural gas—and solar power. I don't want to preach fear, but I get these intense warnings from the Spirit of God. For instance, I was praying over an ice storm once and He told me about Texas being without power. I kept seeing no heat and a poisoning of the water. About three years ago, a major arctic front made everything really cold in Texas. The grid shut down, pipes burst, and they put out a warning not to drink the water because it had E. coli. Before that happened, the Lord warned me to tell friends in Texas they needed cases of water. I bought water too because what I was seeing in the spirit was very alarming. Even if it doesn't always affect everybody, I want to be quick to obey. I saw New York, a major city with big buildings. Pray about the power grid with me. I don't want to be a Debbie Downer and coming on here and going wacky all the time, but these are the three things: the canary, Italy, and the electric grid. Let's pray. Father, I thank You. We lift up Italy, the volcano, and the earthquakes. You warned us that perilous times would come. Shake us and show us what we're supposed to do for our families so we hear You before danger comes. Let us not be led by emotion, but by the Holy Ghost. I pray for every person watching this video, that they would learn to yield themselves to the Spirit of God. We call for clarity and supernatural giftings to see into the spirit realm. We take authority over cyberattacks and false flag events. We plead the blood of Jesus over our power grid. We say we will have power. Give wisdom to Homeland Security and the computer people to protect us from foreign adversaries. Expose all wicked plots. I pray over finances for a hundredfold return. I speak blessing over homes—raises, bonuses, and checks in the mail. Every need is met and every debt is cancelled. I pray over their health and bodies. We take authority over sickness, cancer, and addictions. We call for rain to break drought—the former rain, the latter rain, and even the spiritual rain of the Holy Ghost rain over this nation. Bring an outpouring of Your Spirit. We pray for the leaders, from Joe Biden down, that they would have a fear of the Lord to make godly decisions. In Your presence is fullness of joy. We will not fear. Amen.]
